body:
## Summary
- keep generated true/false statements for sex-purchase and same-sex marriage scoped to Sweden in both SV and EN
- add a generated-variant Sweden-scope validator and focused mutation test covering single-choice and judgement variants
- regenerate canonical CSV and static question bank mirrors

## Verification
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' PATH=/home/billy/sct-manager-content-work/node_modules/.bin:$PATH npm run validate:content`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' PATH=/home/billy/sct-manager-content-work/node_modules/.bin:$PATH node --test --test-name-pattern 'generated variants that drop Sweden scope' tests/content-published-question-types.test.js`
- `PATH=/home/billy/sct-manager-content-work/node_modules/.bin:$PATH node scripts/export-question-bank.js --check`
- `PATH=/home/billy/sct-manager-content-work/node_modules/.bin:$PATH node scripts/export-site-question-bank.js --check`
- `PATH=/home/billy/sct-manager-content-work/node_modules/.bin:$PATH npm run typecheck -- --pretty false`
- `git diff --check`

commits.messageHeadline: content: guard generated Sweden scope parity

title: content: guard generated Sweden scope parity
